title: MeshAI Governance Example
body: End-to-end governed flow pairing BaseMouse context with MeshAI control: retrieve a context pack (live), apply a runtime policy hook on checksum, relevance, and staleness (roadmap), execute the grounded call, and emit an OpenTelemetry context_pack span to MeshAI as audit evidence (live as of 2026-06-09). BaseMouse grounds the agent; MeshAI observes and audits which context it pulled. See docs/meshai-governance-example.md.
author: BaseMouse Core
